step.title: Scan directory structure
step.action: Scan directory structure, identify framework, language, and build system.
Map the top-level layout and note any non-standard organization.

step.title: Map architecture layers
step.action: Map architecture layers: presentation, business logic, data access, infrastructure.
Identify entry points, routing, and module boundaries.

step.title: Identify patterns and conventions
step.action: Identify patterns and conventions: naming, file organization, testing approach, error handling.
Note any design patterns in use (MVC, repository, event-driven, etc.).

step.title: Analyze dependencies
step.action: Analyze dependencies (direct, dev, peer) from package manifests.
Assess dependency health: outdated packages, known vulnerabilities, license concerns.

step.title: Measure code quality
step.action: Measure code quality indicators: complexity hotspots, duplication, test coverage, linting configuration.

step.title: Produce codebase report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with codebase intelligence findings.
